name: claude-code-proxy-config
description: Configure HTTP proxy and custom CA certificates for Claude Code Cache Fix proxy in corporate environments (Zscaler, Netskope, etc.)

commands.title: Claude Code Proxy Config: Show Status
Claude Code Proxy Config: Test Connection to Anthropic API

claude-code-proxy-config.httpsProxy.description: HTTP(S) proxy URL for upstream requests (e.g., http://proxy.corp.example:8080). Leave empty to use system HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY environment variables.

claude-code-proxy-config.noProxy.description: Comma-separated list of hosts to bypass the proxy. Supports wildcards like '.corp.example'.

claude-code-proxy-config.caFile.description: Path to a PEM file containing extra CA certificates (for SSL-inspecting proxies like Zscaler). Alternative to NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS.

claude-code-proxy-config.rejectUnauthori.description: Verify TLS certificates. DISABLE ONLY AS A LAST RESORT while waiting for IT to provide the corporate CA bundle.

claude-code-proxy-config.autoExportCerts.description: (Windows only) Automatically export Zscaler/corporate certificates from Windows cert store to a PEM bundle on activation.

claude-code-proxy-config.certSearchPatte.description: Certificate subject patterns to include when auto-exporting (Windows only).
